# 360 Flatmates — Find Your Flatmate, Find Your Vibe

360 Flatmates is a React-based Progressive Web App (PWA) designed to match roommates and verified rental properties across major Indian cities (such as Bangalore and Gurugram). It utilizes a 6-dimension compatibility matching algorithm, verified property postings, society vibe tagging, and structured scheduling of property visits to streamline shared living arrangements.

## Core Features

- **6-Dimension Compatibility Matching**: Scores users based on sleep schedule compatibility, cleanliness standards, food habits (vegetarian/non-vegetarian kitchen usage), guest policies, work-from-home styles, and general lifestyle preferences.
- **Verified Property Listings**: Directly matching roommate hunters with property poster rooms, featuring verified visual assets, amenities, and rent details (no fake lists).
- **Society Vibe Tags**: Society categorization tags (e.g., active, quiet, sports-centric) to let users search for properties aligning with their social vibe.
- **In-App Chat**: Contextual messaging between room seekers and room posters.
- **Visit Scheduling**: Booking physical or virtual tours directly within the app calendar.

---

## Site Navigation & Public URLs

All public pages are search engine indexable and optimized for LLM reading:

- **Homepage**: `https://360ghar.com/` - Portal landing page showcasing product value, feature bento, and FAQ structured schemas.
- **Discover Listings**: `https://360ghar.com/discover` - Paginated grid directory of active property/roommate listings.
- **Search Portal**: `https://360ghar.com/search` - Search filter interface supporting BHK (bedrooms), cities (Bangalore, Gurugram), and specific amenities (WiFi, Power Backup, AC).
- **Semantic Search**: `https://360ghar.com/search/semantic` - Natural language query engine using vector matching for semantic search.
- **Cities Directory**:
  - Bangalore Listings: `https://360ghar.com/cities/bangalore`
  - Gurugram Listings: `https://360ghar.com/cities/gurugram`
- **Living Blog**: `https://360ghar.com/blog` - Resource library on flatmate living:
  - How to Find Compatible Flatmates: `https://360ghar.com/blog/how-to-find-compatible-flatmates`
  - Flatmate Agreement Essentials: `https://360ghar.com/blog/flatmate-agreement-essentials`
  - Bangalore Rental Market Guide: `https://360ghar.com/blog/bangalore-rental-market-guide`
  - Moving in with Strangers Tips: `https://360ghar.com/blog/moving-in-with-strangers`
  - Room Inspection Checklist: `https://360ghar.com/blog/room-inspection-checklist`
  - Graceful Conflict Resolution: `https://360ghar.com/blog/flatmate-conflict-resolution`
- **Service Comparisons**:
  - Comparison vs NoBroker: `https://360ghar.com/compare/360-flatmates-vs-nobroker`
  - Comparison vs Facebook Groups: `https://360ghar.com/compare/360-flatmates-vs-facebook-groups`
- **Rental Stats**: `https://360ghar.com/stats` - Average price and compatibility match ratios.
- **About Us**: `https://360ghar.com/about` - Vision and credentials.

---

## APIs & Specifications

360 Flatmates runs on a FastAPI backend. For machine readability and agent tools:

- **OpenAPI Schema Document**: `https://360ghar.com/docs/flatmates-openapi.yaml`
- **Primary Endpoint Base**: `/api/v1`
  - **Listing search parameters**: `q` (text search), `city_id` (number), `bedrooms_min` (number), `amenities` (array), `price_min`/`price_max` (numbers).
  - **Compatibility calculation API**: Evaluates vectors corresponding to 6 lifestyle aspects to determine a compatibility score (0-100%).
